Class: GeoAutocomplete

(abstract) bemap.GeoAutocomplete(context, options)

Base class for GeoAutocomplete.

Constructor

(abstract) new GeoAutocomplete(context, options)

Parameters:
Name Type Description
context bemap.Context BeMap-JS-API Context. Mandatory.
options object see below the available values.
Source:
  • bemap-services/bemap-geoAutocomplete.js, line 14

Methods

autocomplete(request, optionsopt) → {Promise.<bemap.AutocompleteGeocodingResponse>|undefined}

Parameters:
Name Type Attributes Description
request bemap.AutocompleteGeocodingRequest | Object When a typed request is passed, a Promise is returned. Any other shape falls through to the legacy callback implementation.
options Object | function <optional>
Source:
  • bemap-services-v2/search/bemap-geo-autocomplete-v2.js, line 37
Returns:
Type
Promise.<bemap.AutocompleteGeocodingResponse> | undefined

autocomplete(options, listener)

Autocomplete is sending only when user stop taping text in input and after option.timer time
Parameters:
Name Type Description
options see below
listener return by function, list of autocomplete results
Source:
  • bemap-services/bemap-geoAutocomplete.js, line 31

showList(inp, arr)

This methode was found on the net to prevent charging jQuery UI lib with nice autocomplete functionality
Parameters:
Name Type Description
inp id of input field
arr result of geocoding already filtred
Source:
  • bemap-services/bemap-geoAutocomplete.js, line 140
